headline: 96°F today, 98°F weekend — run zones early.
weather_notes: Run both zones this morning — last irrigated July 2, and 96°F today through 98°F Monday with no rain in the forecast.
Do all garden work before 9 AM today through Monday — 96-98°F heat closes every afternoon outdoor window for the next 3 days.
Check potato bag moisture after the zone run — grow bags lose moisture significantly faster than ground beds in sustained 96-98°F heat.
Mulch e1-e4 beds if not already done — 14-day transplants need 2-3 inches of cover to hold soil moisture through the 96-98°F weekend.

suggested_tasks.title: Feed c2–c4 bush beans this morning
suggested_tasks.description: 37-day beans with no logged fertilizer — apply fish emulsion early before heat climbs past 90°F.
